steps.title: Translate the length statement
steps.content:
The variable $x$ is the length and $y$ is the height. Since the length is $3$ times the height, the relationship is
$$x=3y$$

steps.title: Translate the height statement
steps.content:
The height is $84$ inches, and $y$ represents the height, so the second equation is
$$y=84$$
The system must include $x=3y$ and $y=84$. The answer is B.
